title: C2 Beaconing Detection (Periodic Connection Analysis)
description: Detects command-and-control beaconing by identifying hosts making periodic outbound connections to the same destination. C2 implants typically beacon at regular intervals. Groups network connections by source-destination pair and counts occurrences — a high count to a single destination suggests automated beaconing rather than human browsing.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' and 'Destination Port' != 80 and 'Destination Port' != 443 | stats count as connection_count by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Destination IP', 'Destination Port' | sort -connection_count | where connection_count > 12
falsepositives: Monitoring agents with periodic health checks
